member.name: T:Core.Interfaces.Repository.IRepository`1
member.summary: Defines a generic repository contract for basic CRUD operations.

member.name: M:Core.Interfaces.Repository.IRepository`1.GetByIdAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves a single entity by its ID.
member.param: The unique identifier of the entity.
member.returns: The entity if found, otherwise null.

member.name: M:Core.Interfaces.Repository.IRepository`1.GetAllAsync
member.summary: Retrieves all entities of the specified type.

member.name: M:Core.Interfaces.Repository.IRepository`1.AddAsync(`0)
member.summary: Adds a new entity to the repository.

member.name: M:Core.Interfaces.Repository.IRepository`1.Update(`0)
member.summary: Updates an existing entity in the repository.

member.name: M:Core.Interfaces.Repository.IRepository`1.Delete(System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes an entity by its ID.
member.param: The unique identifier of the entity to delete.

member.name: M:Core.Interfaces.Repository.IRepository`1.SaveChangesAsync
member.summary: Persists all pending changes to the database.

member.name: M:Core.Interfaces.Repository.IRepository`1.ExistsAsync(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,System.Boolean}})
member.summary: Checks whether any entity satisfies the specified condition.
member.param: A lambda expression defining the condition to check.
member.returns: True if a matching entity exists, otherwise false.
